---
title: "Projects"
---

## Available Projects

### The Three-Point Effect: Analyzing the Relationship Between NBA Three-Point Shooting and Winning

This project analyzes historical NBA team-level data to examine the relationship between three-point shooting and team success. Using year-over-year team statistics, it evaluates how three-point percentage, makes, and attempts relate to win percentage across NBA seasons.

**Skills shown:** Python, pandas, sports analytics, data cleaning, exploratory data analysis, visualization, statistical interpretation

[View Project](projects/three-point-effect.qmd)  
[View GitHub Repository](https://github.com/djfulk-22/The-Three-Point-Effect)

### CourtSpace 3D: Interactive NBA Shot Visualization App

Collaborative Streamlit app with Arvind Madan that visualizes NBA player shot attempts as 3D trajectories on a realistic half court. The app uses NBA shot chart data, Plotly 3D rendering, contextual filters, and a league-relative hot/cold zone heatmap to help users explore player shooting patterns across seasons, opponents, shot types, venues, and game periods.

**My role:** Created the first working prototype, implemented the initial Streamlit app, built the core 3D shot visualization pipeline, added hover text metadata, quarter filtering, hot/cold heatmap mode, the heatmap scaling slider, and designed the caching system for NBA API requests.

**Skills shown:** Python, Streamlit, Plotly, `nba_api`, sports analytics, 3D visualization, data filtering, API caching, interactive dashboard development

[View Project](projects/courtspace-3d.qmd)  
[View Live App](https://courtspace3d-v4.streamlit.app/)  
[View GitHub Repository](https://github.com/mxngojuice/CourtSpace3D-v4/tree/main)

### Personal Portfolio Website

Built this personal portfolio website using Quarto and GitHub Pages to showcase my data science projects, technical skills, academic background, and professional experiences. The site serves as a central location for my work in sports analytics, predictive modeling, data visualization, and applied data science.

**Skills shown:** Quarto, GitHub Pages, Markdown, GitHub, technical communication, portfolio development

[View Website](https://djfulk-22.github.io/)  
[View GitHub Repository](https://github.com/djfulk-22/djfulk-22.github.io)

## Additional Projects Coming Soon

The following projects will be added once their repositories or collaborator access are available:

- UNC Baseball Attendance Prediction
- CourtSpace 3D: Interactive NBA Shot Visualization App
- Pitch Forecaster: MLB Pitch Type Prediction
- NBA Wearable Sensor Data Governance Case Study
